name: Calypso Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a shallow 11-inch x 7-inch baking pan with butter and line the base with parchment or waxed paper.
2. In a large bowl, heat white chocolate, butter, and half of the rum over gently simmering water, stirring until well blended.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining rum.
4. Roughly chop pistachio nuts and add 3/4 of them to the chocolate mixture with cherries and coconut. Mix well.
5. Spread the mixture evenly in the prepared pan.
6. Finely chop the remaining nuts.
7. Pipe squiggly lines of melted semisweet chocolate over the top of the mixture using a small paper piping bag with a hole cut at the bottom.
8. Sprinkle the finely chopped nuts on top.
9. Chill for 4 to 5 hours or until firm, then cut into 30 pieces.
10. Remove from the pan with a flexible spatula and store in the refrigerator or cool place until serving.
